name: gitpreview
description: Preview various file types directly on GitHub without leaving the page.

scripts.build:
vite build && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp rules.json dist/ && cp -r assets dist/ && rm -rf dist/pdf-viewer dist/pdfjs && unzip -o vendor/pdfjs-viewer/pdfjs-5.7.284-dist.zip -d dist/pdf-viewer/ > /dev/null && find dist/pdf-viewer -name '*.map' -delete && rm -f dist/pdf-viewer/web/compressed.tracemonkey-pldi-09.pdf && cp dist/pdf-viewer-loader.js dist/pdf-viewer/web/pdf-loader.js && cp dist/pdf-suppress-warnings.js dist/pdf-viewer/web/pdf-suppress-warnings.js && sed -i 's|<script src="viewer.mjs" type="module"></script>|<script src="pdf-suppress-warnings.js" type="module"></script><script src="viewer.mjs" type="module"></script><script src="pdf-loader.js" type="module"></script>|' dist/pdf-viewer/web/viewer.html && printf 'try{const __w=console.warn;console.warn=function(...a){const m=typeof a[0]==="string"?a.join(" "):"";if(m.includes("JBig2")||m.includes("wasm-eval")||m.includes("CompileError"))return;__w.apply(console,a)}}catch(e){}
' > /tmp/gp_worker_patch.js && cat /tmp/gp_worker_patch.js dist/pdf-viewer/build/pdf.worker.mjs > /tmp/gp_combined.mjs && mv /tmp/gp_combined.mjs dist/pdf-viewer/build/pdf.worker.mjs
scripts.package: npm run build && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && CHROME=$(find ~/.cache/ms-playwright -name 'chrome' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1) && mkdir -p release && if [ -f keys/gitpreview.pem ]; then "$CHROME" --pack-extension=$PWD/dist --pack-extension-key=$PWD/keys/gitpreview.pem --no-message-box 2>/dev/null; else "$CHROME" --pack-extension=$PWD/dist --no-message-box 2>/dev/null && mv dist.pem keys/gitpreview.pem; fi && mv dist.crx "release/gitpreview-v$VERSION.crx" && echo "Created release/gitpreview-v$VERSION.crx"
